# گروه فناوری بقایی (Baghaei Tech Group)

> Persian (RTL) software engineering studio specializing in scalable enterprise system architecture, AI, cybersecurity, and web & mobile development. Also publishes free, offline-capable Persian utility calculators.

## Main pages
- [خانه / Home](https://baghaei.com/): Company overview, services, and selected projects.
- [پروژه‌ها / Projects](https://baghaei.com/projects): Portfolio of delivered platforms and products.
- [وبلاگ / Blog](https://baghaei.com/blog): Engineering articles on architecture, microservices, security, and DevOps.
- [ابزارها / Tools](https://baghaei.com/tools): Free Persian calculators (loans, inheritance, tax, BMI, unit conversion, and more).
- [درباره ما / About](https://baghaei.com/about): Team, expertise, and values.
- [تماس / Contact](https://baghaei.com/#contact): Start a collaboration.

## Legal
- [قوانین و مقررات / Terms](https://baghaei.com/terms)
- [حریم خصوصی / Privacy](https://baghaei.com/privacy)
